kw.name: Login To API
Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=http://api-server:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${data} = {'username': 'admin', 'password': '123456'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='api-server', port=8000): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused")': /login

Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=1, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='api-server', port=8000): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused")': /login

Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=0, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='api-server', port=8000): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused")': /login

POST Request : url=http://api-server:8000/login path_url=/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '30', 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'} body=username=admin&password=123456
${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Get From Dictionary
kw.msg: ${token} = eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJBZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3NzM4NzY3NH0.ad5lQzgL2caKE8WjeOK3wR9Ls19T73FIPztockWqmdo
kw.doc: Returns a value from the given ``dictionary`` based on the given ``key``.

kw.name: Set Suite Variable
kw.msg: ${ACCESS_TOKEN} = eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJBZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3NzM4NzY3NH0.ad5lQzgL2caKE8WjeOK3wR9Ls19T73FIPztockWqmdo
kw.doc: Makes a variable available everywhere within the scope of the current suite.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.
ทดสอบการเข้าสู่ระบบและบันทึก access token

test.name: Verify Get All ROPA Records Successfully

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=http://api-server:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${headers} = {'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJBZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3NzM4NzY3NH0.ad5lQzgL2caKE8WjeOK3wR9Ls19T73FIPztockWqmdo'}
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://api-server:8000/ropa path_url=/ropa headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJBZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3NzM4NzY3NH0.ad5lQzgL2caKE8WjeOK3wR9Ls19T73FIPztockWqmdo'} body=None
${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: ทดสอบการดึงข้อมูลบันทึกการประมวลผลข้อมูล (ROPA) ทั้งหมด

test.name: Verify Create New ROPA Record

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${payload} = {'purpose': 'Data Processing for Analysis', 'data_subject': 'Customer', 'data_category': 'Personal Information', 'legal_basis': 'consent', 'retention_period': '3', 'status': 'pending', 'reason': 'Test...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.msg: ${headers} = {'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJBZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3NzM4NzY3NH0.ad5lQzgL2caKE8WjeOK3wR9Ls19T73FIPztockWqmdo', 'Content-Type': 'applicatio...
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api_session, url=http://api-server:8000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://api-server:8000/ropa path_url=/ropa headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJzdWIiOiJhZG1pbiIsInJvbGUiOiJBZG1pbiIsImV4cCI6MTc3NzM4NzY3NH0.ad5lQzgL2caKE8WjeOK3wR9Ls19T73FIPztockWqmdo', 'Content-Type': 'application/json', 'Content-Length': '209'} body=b'{"purpose": "Data Processing for Analysis", "data_subject": "Customer", "data_category": "Personal Information", "legal_basis": "consent", "retention_period": "3", "status": "pending", "reason": "Test Reason"}'
${response} = <Response [200]>
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

test.doc: ทดสอบการสร้างบันทึกการประมวลผลข้อมูลใหม่ (ROPA)

errors.msg: Retrying (RetryAdapter(total=2, connect=None, read=None, redirect=None, status=None)) after connection broken by 'NewConnectionError("HTTPConnection(host='api-server', port=8000): Failed to establish a new connection: [Errno 111] Connection refused")': /login
